element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players learn passing, shooting, and movement in opening matches against default difficulty opponents
Fundamental for speed and dunking; available from match start with limited resource management
Unlocks unlimited turbo and increased precision; teaches momentum and risk/reward of aggressive play
Only rule constraint; teaches spatial timing on defensive dunks
Creates time pressure; teaches pacing and offensive rhythm
Differentiates from sim basketball; teaches aggressive positioning as core strategy
Easter eggs (Bill Clinton, mascots, hidden players); incentivizes exploration outside standard play
Escalates opponent AI and team composition as player advances through tournament

typical_relief_triggers: Gaining "On Fire" state and unlimited turbo
Shot clock reset after successful basket
typical_tension_triggers: Losing "On Fire" state when opponent scores
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast-paced arcade rhythm with constant momentum swings; tension builds through score differential and clock pressure, relieved by successful offensive streaks and "On Fire" activation. Match-level pace is rapid; tournament-level pace accelerates through progressive opponent difficulty.

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Button combinations and controller inputs unlock hidden characters and features (e.g., A five times + right five times = Super Clean Floors); codes activate secret players

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory matches with baseline NBA rosters; emphasis on learning mechanics without aggressive opponent strategies
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Tournament progression introduces stronger team compositions and improved AI opponent aggression
difficulty_curve.late_game: Tournament finals and advanced opponents feature enhanced dunk abilities, faster court control, and coordinated defensive schemes
notable_spikes: Transition to tournament mode from exhibition play
Finals tier opponents with superior athlete ratings

notable_level_patterns.description: Single match against any selected NBA team; no progression stakes; allows skill building and feature exploration
Sequential matchups against tournament-tier opponents with escalating difficulty; win-based advancement structure
Secrets embedded in menu navigation, controller inputs, and code entry; rewards exploration and experimentation outside standard play
